name: Hollyland Walkie Talkie Converter Box
description: Hollyland, a leading manufacturer of wireless video transmission systems, offers a remarkable solution for filmmakers and production teams: the Walkie Talkie Converter. This innovative device bridges the gap between audio and video equipment, streamlining communication and improving overall production efficiency. In this article, we will explore the features, specifications, and benefits of the Hollyland Walkie Talkie Converter.

features.Key Features :: Easy to install and Easy to use | Support PTT, VOX working mode | DC-12V power supply, more safety and stable | Professional ports, more stable and higher compatibility | Frequency response range 100Hz~20KHz | The maximum input level is 18dBu | The audio gain of the converter is 4dB | Distortion<1% | VOX threshold value>-23dBu | S/N>55dB | Power<1W
features.What's in The Box :: 1x Warranty Card | 1x User Manual | 1x 12V/2A DC2.1 Power Adapter | 1x Walkie-Talkie Converter-Box
